'''Pezzle''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] on [[Karfeddion/Legends|Karfeddion]]. One day he entered [[the Tipsy Mynock]] to collect payment from a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] named [[Lope (individual)|Lope]]. To demonstrate Lope's worthiness to accompany [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Arwen Cohl]] on a [[Nebula Front/Legends|Nebula Front]] attack on the [[Eriadu Trade Summit]], Lope killed Pezzle and his three companions with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Cloak of Deception]]'' {{1st}}
